name: link-like-setlist-maker-backend

scripts.test: prisma generate && env TEST_DATABASE_URL="${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-}" TEST_DIRECT_URL="${TEST_DIRECT_URL:-${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-}}" tsx scripts/assert-test-database.ts && env DATABASE_URL="${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-}" DIRECT_URL="${TEST_DIRECT_URL:-${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-}}" prisma migrate reset --force --skip-generate && env TEST_DATABASE_URL="${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-}" TEST_DIRECT_URL="${TEST_DIRECT_URL:-${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-}}" DATABASE_URL="${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-}" DIRECT_URL="${TEST_DIRECT_URL:-${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-}}" vitest run

description: Backend API for the Link Like setlist maker.
